rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Ramine Etow, Patrik Olson
rule_metadata.title: Successful Login with Hacktool

rules.rule_text:
title: Successful Login with Hacktool
id: f142e6bc-235d-49d0-8db6-458075f98a32
description: Successful logon with suspicious user-agent, indicating a password spray
  attack
status: test
author: NTT Security - Ramine Etow, Patrik Olson
date: 2025-01-22
logsource:
  category: auth
detection:
  selection_logsource:
    type|cased: AUTH
    action|cased: A
  selection_hacktool:
  - http_user_agent|cased:
    - Wfuzz/*
    - fasthttp
    - Fuzz Faster U Fool*
    - Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; MSIE 6.0; Windows NT 5.1)
    - Apache-HttpClient/UNAVAILABLE (java 1.4)
    - Dalvik/1.6.0 (Linux; U; Android 4.4.2; R8007 Build/JLS36C)
    - Dominos/4.1.0 (Android 4.4.2; OPPO/R8007; en)
    - Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; MSIE 7.0; Windows NT 6.0; .NET CLR 1.1.4322; .NET CLR
      2.0.50727; .NET CLR 3.0.4506.2152; .NET CLR 3.5.30729)
    - Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; MSIE 8.0; Windows NT 6.1; .NET CLR 1.1.4322; .NET CLR
      2.0.50727; .NET CLR 3.0.4506.2152; .NET CLR 3.5.30729)
    - Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 4.4.2; R8007 Build/JLS36C) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML,
      like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/30.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36
    - Mozilla/5.0 (SmartScreens; U; Linux) Metro/AN1.0.0.0.1 0.0.0.1 Rhapsody 736
    - Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 6.3; WOW64; rv:53.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/53.0
    - Mozilla/5.0 (Windows; U; Windows NT 5.1; en) AppleWebKit/522.11.3 (KHTML, like
      Gecko) Version/3.0 Safari/522.11.3
    - Mozilla/5.0 (Windows; U; Windows NT 5.1; en-US; rv:1.9.0.11) Gecko/2009060215
      Firefox/3.0.11
    - Opera/9.80 (Windows NT 6.0; U; en) Presto/2.2.0 Version/10.00
    - PJA4.7.6455
    - Panera/3.86.3 (Android; OPPO/R8007; 4.4.2; release)
    - RestSharp/105.2.3.0
    - Sahibinden-Android/3.13.1 (299; Android 4.4.2; OPPO R8007)
    - Shutterstock Consumer 1.6.2 (OPPO R8007; Android 4.4.2; en_US)
    - SoundCloud-Android/2017.05.08-release (Android 4.4.2; OPPO R8007)
    - ULTA/4.6 Android
    - Windows Gyft/2.3.6 (OPPO R8007; Android 4.4.2; Scale/1.5)
    - ZooskAndroid/395 (Linux; U; Android 4.4.2; en-US; R8007; Build/JLS36C)
    - android/4.4.2/OPPO R8007/117/com.rewardable
    - com.sei.android/2.3.4 Android/4.4.2
    - okhttp/3.4.2
    - Avant Browser (http://www.avantbrowser.com)
    - Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; MSIE 6.0; Windows NT 5.1)
    - Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; MSIE 6.0; Windows NT 5.1) Opera 7.54 [en]
    - Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; MSIE 6.0; Windows NT 5.1; SV1; MyIE2; FDM; .NET CLR
      1.1.4322)
    - Mozilla/5.0 (Windows; U; Windows NT 5.1; de-DE; rv:1.7.5) Gecko/20041122 Firefox/1.0
    - Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; Konqueror/3.3; Linux) (KHTML, like Gecko)
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
